title: narcissus minor var. nanus
intro: Narcissus minor var. nanus is a dwarf form of the lesser narcissus plant, a species of flowering plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its alkaloids, including galantamine and lycorine. The health benefits of Narcissus minor var. nanus include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce anxiety and improve sleep quality. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by drying the flowers and leaves, which are then used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
